Uses of Interface
org.apache.juneau.commons.settings.PropertySourceProvider

Packages that use PropertySourceProvider
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.commons.settings
Thread-safe system property access with support for global and per-thread overrides, making it useful for unit tests and configuration management.
org.apache.juneau.config
Configuration Support

  • Uses of PropertySourceProvider in org.apache.juneau.config

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.config that implement PropertySourceProvider
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ConfigPropertySourceProvider
    Auto-registers a classpath-default juneau.cfg (and the other names returned by Config.getCandidateSystemDefaultConfigNames()) as a PropertySource for the process-wide Settings singleton.
